author: Sree Harinandan
name: Compiled LeakyReLU2 + Slide64 Eval (1xRTX4090)
blurb: Non-record 1xRTX4090 submission showing that slide64 evaluation transfers cleanly to the compiled leaky 9-layer proxy. The same 600s training setup improves from 1.36461125 flat-eval val_bpb to 1.33207082 with sliding evaluation, while staying under the 16MB artifact cap.
